race.comment: STAR BLAZER (1) distance specialist who improved quickly second-up with a dominant on-pace win over 1600m at Corowa. Claim helps again and he looks to have come back even stronger this time in. PHILADELPHIA STORM (3) has a good record here and never suited on the tight track when sixth over 1600m at Corowa. Should get his desired tempo today and look for him launching late. CAYMAN ISLAND (12) racing well and unlucky not to have a few more wins on the CV. Shouldered the 59.5kg for a game on-pace third over 1500m at this track. Doesn't have to improve much to run the trip and drops 4kg in weight today. Each-way. MAID IN DUBAI (4) caught the eye first-up when he launched late from last on the turn with a tidy seventh over 1300m at Echuca. Has a good second-up record and ready for this trip and further now. The chances don't end there.
